meaning: n.产于南美 Andes山脉的骆马之类
examples: So too has the Rare Animal Range, replete with deer and guanaco, a South American relative of the llama.
Small wild cud-chewing Andean animal similar to the guanaco but smaller; valued for its fleecy undercoat.
So too has the Rare Animal Range, replete with deer and guanaco, a South American relative of the llama .
Here you can watch flightless steamer ducks, Andean condors and guanaco (rare llama-like herbivores), and explore the glacier-lined Beagle Channel, made famous by Darwin and Fitzroy.
